raw_consumer_statement:
Between XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/XXXX, I paid XXXX XXXX  ( XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX ) using my Barclays XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX credit card.

These charges, totaling {$96000.00}, were for promised business funding/HELOC/SBA services that were never delivered.

I have invoices and text messages showing repeated misrepresentations, such as closing this week, a {$74000.00} lien delay ( 2045 days ), and refund promises ( 1014 business days ).

None of these refunds or services ever occurred.

I filed disputes with Barclays. On XXXX XXXX, XXXX, Barclays credited all six charges and mailed a credit-balance refund check on XXXX XXXX, XXXX. Barclays later reversed the credits after merchant representment, despite the merchants providing no proof of actual services delivered. 

This is a billing dispute / services not rendered case under Regulation Z, and Barclays has failed to resolve it properly.
